title: Do I Need An AI Strategy?
summary: In freight forwarding and customs brokerage, AI has rapidly shifted from a “nice to have” to a competitive and operational necessity. In this executive primer, John Pennypacker, Senior Vice President at Deep Cognition, explains why 2025 marks a clear inflection point for the industry and why companies without a real AI strategy risk falling behind on cost, […]
author: Anusha Sudhakaran
